name: Workflow 4: All Quotations Ready — QCS Summary Email to HoP

parameters.subject: =Action Required: Quotations Ready for Approval – {{ $json.project }}
parameters.message:
=

Quotation Comparison Sheet Ready for Review

Dear Head of Procurement,

All quotations for the following RFQ have been collected and are ready for your approval:

{{ $json.tableHtml }}

Review QCS in Dashboard →

This is an automated notification from the ThyssenKrupp Procurement System.

parameters.columns: recipient_email, recipient_role, email_type, request_id, subject, status
id, role, rfq_id, qcs_id, title, message, type, read

additionalFields.title: =Quotations Ready: {{ $json.project }}
additionalFields.message: =All quotations for RFQ {{ $json.rfqId }} are ready. Please review and approve the QCS.

meta.description: Triggered when Procurement submits a QCS to HoP. Fetches all quotations from Supabase, builds a price-comparison summary table, emails HoP, logs the email, and sends a real-time notification.
